expectations.text: Reads tasks.md and identifies pending tasks
expectations.evidence: Would read openspec/changes/register-export/tasks.md and identify unchecked tasks before writing code.
Would implement in dependency order: ExportService → ExportController → tests → route.
task-3 is an explicit unchecked task; would implement tests/Unit/Service/ExportServiceTest.php covering happy path + error path.
Would run quality suite after all four tasks; admits catching failures close to source is cheaper.
Would update via 'gh issue edit' after each task commit.

notes: Happy path is strong without the skill — the value of the skill shows in the specific mechanism (openspec CLI, plan.json tracking, headless contract) not the outcome assertions.
